blended.narrative: Boyne Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
